property.name: action-label
property.value: Clean 100ms tap on light-amp vJoy button. Activation-mode must stay "release" (not "both").

property.name: action-label
property.value: Tap: flightready / portlocks dbl / lights. Hold 0.5s: light amp toggle.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Clean 100ms tap on light-amp vJoy button. Activation-mode must stay "release" (not "both").

property.name: action-label
property.value: Tap: ping radar. Hold 0.5s: light amp toggle (via macro -- SC needs tap-shape).
